title: 我最好的朋友
pinyin: Wǒ zuì hǎo de péng you
description_uz: «Eng yaqin do'sting kim?» — do'stlik haqida ikki kishining suhbati. Bu dialog eng yaqin do'st haqida so'rash, qanday tanishganini, uning sevimli mashg'ulotini va birga vaqt o'tkazishni (KTVda qo'shiq aytish) muhokama qilishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik, foydali so'zlar bilan — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Кто твой лучший друг?» — разговор двух человек о дружбе. Диалог тренирует, как спросить о лучшем друге, как вы познакомились, его увлечения и совместное времяпровождение (пение в караоке). Близкая тема и полезная лексика — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «Who is your best friend?» — a chat between two people about friendship. This dialogue practices asking about a best friend, how you met, their hobbies, and hanging out together (singing at KTV). Relatable topic with useful vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuì hǎo de péng you shì shéi?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuì hǎo de péng you jiào Wáng Fāng.
sentences.text_translation: Mening eng yaqin do'stim Van Fan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Мою лучшую подругу зовут Ван Фан.
sentences.text_translation_en: My best friend is called Wang Fang.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ men shì zěn me rèn shi de?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men shì dà xué tóng xué.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tā xǐ huan zuò shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: What does she like to do?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ men jīng cháng yì qǐ wán ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you often hang out together?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是的，我们常常一起去KTV唱歌。
sentences.pinyin: Shì de, wǒ men cháng cháng yì qǐ qù KTV chàng gē.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, biz tez-tez birga KTVga qo'shiq aytgani boramiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, мы часто вместе ходим в караоке петь.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes, we often go to KTV to sing together.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tā chàng gē hǎo tīng ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很好听，我觉得她很厉害。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn hǎo tīng, wǒ jué de tā hěn lì hai.
sentences.text_translation: Juda yoqimli, menimcha u juda zo'r.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень красиво, я думаю, она молодец.
sentences.text_translation_en: Very nice — I think she's amazing.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tā tīng qǐ lai hěn bú cuò.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Shì a, wǒ hěn xǐ huan tā.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, men uni juda yaxshi ko'raman.
sentences.speaker: B
